name: github-gh
description: Inspect repositories, triage pull requests and issues, debug CI, and publish changes through a local GitHub CLI workflow that works without ChatGPT app login.

interface.shortDescription: Triage PRs, issues, CI, and publish flows with GitHub CLI
interface.longDescription: Use GitHub (gh) to inspect repositories, review pull requests, address feedback, debug failing Actions checks, and prepare code changes for review through a local GitHub CLI workflow that works in API mode without ChatGPT app login.
defaultPrompt: Inspect PRs, triage issues, debug failing checks, and prepare code changes for review with gh
